# Песнопоец Клима

> AC retailer and installer in Varna, Bulgaria. Sales, installation, and maintenance of air conditioners from Daikin, Mitsubishi, Gree, Toshiba and other brands.

## About
- Location: Varna, Bulgaria (covers Varna + 30km region)
- Services: AC sales, professional installation, annual maintenance, repair, diagnostics
- Own installation crew (not subcontractors)
- Languages: Bulgarian, English, Russian, Ukrainian
- Payment: Cash, bank transfer, card on-site (no online payment)

## Products
- Air conditioners from authorized distributors
- Brands: Daikin, Mitsubishi, Gree, Toshiba, AUX, TechPoint, Midea and others
- Price range: 150–2500 EUR
- All models are inverter type
- Catalog: https://pesnopoets-clima.com/bg/klimatici

## Installation
- Standard installation from 300 BGN (includes 3m pipe, materials, vacuum, commissioning)
- Tiers: up to 14K BTU — 300 BGN, up to 24K BTU — 370 BGN, up to 33K BTU — 440 BGN
- Same-day installation available
- 12 months warranty on installation work

## Maintenance & Repair
- Annual maintenance from 70 BGN
- Diagnostics: 40 BGN
- All brands serviced
- Freon refill (R-32, R-410A)

## Warranty
- Up to 5 years manufacturer warranty when installed by our crew
- 12 months warranty on installation

## Coverage
- Varna city and region (all neighborhoods)
- Outside city by arrangement (up to ~30km)

## Contact
- Phone: +359 87 799 8795
- Email: pesnopoetsklima@gmail.com
- Website: https://pesnopoets-clima.com
- AI Consultant available on website (24/7)

## Blog
- https://pesnopoets-clima.com/bg/blog — Expert articles on AC selection, heating, maintenance for Varna's coastal climate
